title: CG Board Result 2026 LIVE: Chhattisgarh board results to be out today at 2.30 pm on cgbse.nic.in
description: CG Board Result 2026 LIVE: Chhattisgarh Board results will be announced today at 2.30 pm. The Class 10, 12 results can be checked by candidates at cgbse.nic.in. Follow the blog for latest updates.
